text.title: PM Certification Exam Changes 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the pm-certification-changes-2026 methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: source_2026_eco
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Diff must cite the official 2026 ECO PDF as primary source; secondary sources only as confirmation.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `source-2026-eco` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: explicit_deltas
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Diff must list explicit added / removed / renamed / reweighted tasks per domain — not summary prose.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `explicit-deltas` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: weight_percentages_exact
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Domain weights must be cited exactly (People 33% / Process 41% / Business Environment 26%).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `weight-percentages-exact` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: effective_date_flagged
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: All consumers must be reminded the change is effective 2026-07-01; pre-date sittings unaffected.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `effective-date-flagged` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: candidate_action_included
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Diff must include a 'what to do differently' paragraph for candidates currently studying.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `candidate-action-included` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-pm-certification-changes-2026.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
